### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://adguard.com/es/versions/browser-extension/release.html?clid=vU5AN7--QgD9pZ&utm_campaign=github_version_popup&utm_medium=version_popup&utm_source=browser_extension](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fadguard.com%2Fes%2Fversions%2Fbrowser-extension%2Frelease.html%3Fclid%3DvU5AN7--QgD9pZ%26utm_campaign%3Dgithub_version_popup%26utm_medium%3Dversion_popup%26utm_source%3Dbrowser_extension) ### Comment > genera problemas en los videos de YouTube, lo cual los videos se presentan un lag, Asi el video ralentizado por momentos, desinstale la extension adguard y reinicie el navegor y los videos reproducen normal. la vuelvo a instalar y al cason de dos o tres videos se presenta el lag en los videos ### Screenshots

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Anti Adblock Script
labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

labels.name: NSFW
labels.description: Nudes and porn sites

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

comment.body:
This issue is known to be solved with [AdGuard Extra](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardExtra) userscript.

If you’re using AdGuard Browser Extension, we suggest installing AdGuard Extra in addition to it.

* [Install for Chrome, Edge or other Chromium-based browsers](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_chrome_release)
* [Install for Firefox](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_firefox_release)

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.diff_hunk:
@@ -0,0 +1,84 @@
+name: Rotating Domains Checker
+
+on:
+  # Automatic run daily at 02:00 UTC
+  schedule:
+    - cron: '0 2 * * *'
+  # Manual run with mode selection
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      mode:
+        description: 'Run mode'
+        required: false
+        default: 'prod_live'
+        type: choice
+        options:
+          - ''              # Use config.yml setting
+          - 'prod_live'     # Production mode with changes
+          - 'prod_dry'      # Production mode without changes (git operations simulation)
+          - 'test_live'     # Test directory with changes
+          - 'test_dry'      # Test directory without changes (git operations simulation)
+
+      config-path:
+        description: 'Path to configuration file'
+        required: false
+        default: './rdc_config.yml'
+        type: string
+
+      filters-path:
+        description: 'Path to filters directory'
+        required: false
+        default: './'
+        type: string
+
+jobs:
+  check-domains:
+    name: Rotating Domains Checker
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    permissions:
+      contents: write          # Required for commits
+      pull-requests: write     # Required for PR creation
+      actions: read            # Required for reading workflow info
+
+    steps:
+      - name: 📥 Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+          fetch-depth: 1
+
+      - name: 🔧 Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: '24'
+          cache: 'npm'
+
+      - name: 🚀 Run Rotating Domains Checker
+        run: |
+          # Configure git user for commits
+          git config --global user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
+          git config --global user.name "github-actions[bot]"
+
+          # Clone Rotating Domains Checker repository (public, no token needed)
+          git clone https://github.com/Alex-302/RotatingDomainsChecker.git /tmp/checker
+          cd /tmp/checker
+          npm install
+          npm run build
+
+          # Return to filters repository and run checker
+          cd $GITHUB_WORKSPACE
+          node /tmp/checker/dist/index.js

@@ -0,0 +1,84 @@
+name: Rotating Domains Checker
+
+on:
+  # Automatic run daily at 02:00 UTC
+  schedule:
+    - cron: '0 2 * * *'
+  # Manual run with mode selection
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      mode:
+        description: 'Run mode'
+        required: false
+        default: 'prod_live'
+        type: choice
+        options:
+          - ''              # Use config.yml setting
+          - 'prod_live'     # Production mode with changes
+          - 'prod_dry'      # Production mode without changes (git operations simulation)
+          - 'test_live'     # Test directory with changes
+          - 'test_dry'      # Test directory without changes (git operations simulation)
+
+      config-path:
+        description: 'Path to configuration file'
+        required: false
+        default: './rdc_config.yml'
+        type: string
+
+      filters-path:
+        description: 'Path to filters directory'
+        required: false
+        default: './'
+        type: string
+
+jobs:
+  check-domains:
+    name: Rotating Domains Checker
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    permissions:
+      contents: write          # Required for commits
+      pull-requests: write     # Required for PR creation
+      actions: read            # Required for reading workflow info
+
+    steps:
+      - name: 📥 Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+          fetch-depth: 1
+
+      - name: 🔧 Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: '24'
+          cache: 'npm'
+
+      - name: 🚀 Run Rotating Domains Checker
+        run: |
+          # Configure git user for commits
+          git config --global user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
+          git config --global user.name "github-actions[bot]"
+
+          # Clone Rotating Domains Checker repository (public, no token needed)
+          git clone https://github.com/Alex-302/RotatingDomainsChecker.git /tmp/checker
+          cd /tmp/checker
+          npm install
+          npm run build
+
+          # Return to filters repository and run checker
+          cd $GITHUB_WORKSPACE
+          node /tmp/checker/dist/index.js

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://www.fortnite.com](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.fortnite.com) ### Comment > Bonjour, > > J'utilise la version payante de AdGuard, le bloqueur de publicité, sur Windows. > > Ce logiciel permet également d'activer une protection DNS. Cette protection DNS crée des problèmes chez moi. > > Quand je sélectionne et active le DNS "AdGuard DNS", cela crée un problème dans le jeu Fortnite, et il est impossible de trouver une partie. La recherche tourne dans le vide et après quelques minutes, un message dans le jeu indique qu'il y a un problème de communication avec le serveur et cela recommence ainsi en boucle. > > Si je désactive la protection DNS, tout marche sans souci, si je réactive la protection DNS avec le DNS AdGuard, cela ne marche de nouveau plus. > > Je viens également de constater que quand le DNS "AdGuard DNS" est activé, l'application AdGuard de bureau (Windows) elle-même n'est pas en mesure de rechercher les mises à jour, si je désactive le DNS "AdGuard DNS", la vérification de mise à jour ne rencontre aucun problème. Avec le DNS activé un message indique : "Impossible de vérifier les mises à jour - Veillez vérifier votre connexion internet ou réessayez plus tard" > > J'ai tenté d'envoyer un message au support depuis l'application de bureau, je ne pouvais même pas a envoyer le message si DNS AdGuard est activé, j'ai été obligé de désactiver ce DNS pour que le message soit envoyé. > Avec le DNS activé, j'avais ce message d'erreur : "Le délai d'attente de l'opération a expiré" > > En vous remerciant pour votre aide. ### Screenshots

> I tested with the 'AdGuard DNS' and the 'AdGuard non-filtering DNS', disabling all filters for both as requested, it makes no difference, even for searching for its own updates.

Ok, it seems it is relater to DNS configuration of some domains. AdGuard non-filtering DNS server does not block requests. If not secret, where do you live? (only Country) We don't have our DNS servers in each country, sometimes it causes rare problems.

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Anti Adblock Script
labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

labels.name: NSFW
labels.description: Nudes and porn sites

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

@mashr1208 Reproduced with Google / CloudFlare DNS + AdGuard DNS filter? Without DNS filter all good?
If so, please enable AdGuard DNS filter, open the filtering log (recent activity), turn off/on internet connection, wait 5 seconds, clear the filtering log and reproduce the problem. Then make screenshots of blocked requests (in 3-dots menu you can hide non blocked requests).

Уже исправлено. Обновите расширение или добавьте в пользовательский фильтр строку:
```adblock
@@||wbbasket.ru/vol2/site/app/cookiePolicy.*.js$domain=wildberries.ru|wildberries.by|wildberries.am|wildberries.uz|wildberries.kg
```
гугл запретил автоматическое обновление фильтров.

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://photos.google.com](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fphotos.google.com) ### Comment > Hello AdGuard Support Team, > > I would like to report an issue with video playback in Google Photos when using AdGuard for Mac. > > **Environment:** > > * AdGuard for Mac: **2.18.0.2089 (release)** > * macOS: **26.2 (25C56)** > * Browser: **Microsoft Edge Version 144.0.3719.115 (Official build) (arm64)** > (same behavior observed in other browsers) > * AdGuard Browser Extension: installed, but the issue persists even when the extension is disabled > > **Issue description:** > > * Videos on Google Photos (`https://photos.google.com`) fail to play. > * The video shows a loading spinner for a long time and then displays the message: > *“An error occurred. Please try again later.”* > * This happens **only when the AdGuard for Mac application is active**. > * As soon as I **pause AdGuard for Mac**, videos start playing immediately and reliably. > > **Key observations:** > > * Disabling the AdGuard browser extension has **no effect**. > * Adding exceptions: > > * via the regular whitelist, > * and via **Advanced Settings** (including broad domains such as `*.google.com`, `*.googleusercontent.com`, `*.gstatic.com`) > **does not resolve the issue**. > * Changing filtering modes (e.g. Automatic Proxy) **does not help**. > * **YouTube works without any issues** while AdGuard is active. > * The issue is reproducible across browsers and profiles. > > **Steps to reproduce:** > > 1. Enable AdGuard for Mac. > 2. Open Google Photos and attempt to play any video → playback fails. > 3. Pause AdGuard for Mac and reload the page → video plays successfully. > > If needed, I am happy to **provide debug logs or additional diagnostic information**. > Please let me know the preferred way to collect and submit logs for further analysis. > > Thank you for your time and support. > > ### Screenshots

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

comment.body: @Glassertje I think you could dig a little into the app's settings to disable the app's own ad serving features. Look in the settings, go to all the sections and subsections of the app. Read everything carefully regarding the settings. There is another option: you can simply use the Facebook website in Safari to have the app remove ads from your feed. It might be a bit more inconvenient than the app, but give it a try.

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://www.fortnite.com](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.fortnite.com) ### Comment > Bonjour, > > J'utilise la version payante de AdGuard, le bloqueur de publicité, sur Windows. > > Ce logiciel permet également d'activer une protection DNS. Cette protection DNS crée des problèmes chez moi. > > Quand je sélectionne et active le DNS "AdGuard DNS", cela crée un problème dans le jeu Fortnite, et il est impossible de trouver une partie. La recherche tourne dans le vide et après quelques minutes, un message dans le jeu indique qu'il y a un problème de communication avec le serveur et cela recommence ainsi en boucle. > > Si je désactive la protection DNS, tout marche sans souci, si je réactive la protection DNS avec le DNS AdGuard, cela ne marche de nouveau plus. > > Je viens également de constater que quand le DNS "AdGuard DNS" est activé, l'application AdGuard de bureau (Windows) elle-même n'est pas en mesure de rechercher les mises à jour, si je désactive le DNS "AdGuard DNS", la vérification de mise à jour ne rencontre aucun problème. Avec le DNS activé un message indique : "Impossible de vérifier les mises à jour - Veillez vérifier votre connexion internet ou réessayez plus tard" > > J'ai tenté d'envoyer un message au support depuis l'application de bureau, je ne pouvais même pas a envoyer le message si DNS AdGuard est activé, j'ai été obligé de désactiver ce DNS pour que le message soit envoyé. > Avec le DNS activé, j'avais ce message d'erreur : "Le délai d'attente de l'opération a expiré" > > En vous remerciant pour votre aide. ### Screenshots
